title: Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
company: Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd!
